description:
With Stream Deck, unleash your creative genius and make waves across Twitch and YouTube. All while focusing on what matters most your audience. As a broadcaster that likes to produce on the fly and have high quality production.


What’s new in Stream Deck 7.4.2?

🔥 Elgato Week - Save up to 30%
From May 18-24, shop deals on your next upgrade at elgato.com.
Deals, prices, and availability may vary by region. Only while supply lasts. Exclusively on Elgato. Terms and conditions apply.

Bug fixes & performance improvements
- Corrected the icon for play/pause action on the Stream Deck XL default profile
- Fixed a bug where assigning Right-Alt as a Hotkey would incorrectly register as Ctrl+Alt when using an English (UK) keyboard layout
- Fixed a bug where pressing Delete while the Icon Library search field was focused would clear a key's custom icon
- Fixed an issue with Stream Deck Neo freezing when applying a screensaver

Want to share feedback on Stream Deck 7.4/2? Connect with us:
- Leave a comment on our Subreddit
- Chat with fellow community members on Discord
- Hit up @elgato on X
- Discover more on Explorer
- Contact our Support Team

1Password menu is available. Press down arrow to select.
